news.t: Investors are rushing to buy TIPS ETFs to beat inflation. They could end up losing.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio TIPS ETF (SPIP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Govt Inflation-Linked index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of inflation-protected US Treasurys with a remaining maturity of at least one year. SPIP was launched on May 25, 2007 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Investors are rushing to buy TIPS ETFs to beat inflation. They could end up losing.
data.text: Inflation-protected funds don't always protect against inflation. As consumer-price inflation hits a three-year high due to the Iran war, the premise in their names is being tested.
